testcase.name: test_rolling_summary_after_10_messages

failure.message: AssertionError: expected has_summary=true after 10 messages; got {'has_summary': False, 'recent_messages': 7} assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdd95d58f3c0>('has_summary') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdd95d58f3c0> = {'has_summary': False, 'recent_messages': 7}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mentor_v2.py:297: in test_rolling_summary_after_10_messages assert ml.get("has_summary") is True, ( E AssertionError: expected has_summary=true after 10 messages; got {'has_summary': False, 'recent_messages': 7} E assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdd95d58f3c0>('has_summary') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdd95d58f3c0> = {'has_summary': False, 'recent_messages': 7}.get
